file: source: user-provided upload, 2026-07-17, dumped via pdf-lib getForm().getFields() + /TU tooltip extraction

fields.name: applicantname
fields.tooltip: Enter the Applicant Business Legal Name.

fields.name: OC
fields.tooltip: If the Applicant is an Operating Company (OC), please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: EPC
fields.tooltip: If the Applicant is an Eligible Passive Company (EPC), please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: operatingnbusname
fields.tooltip: If EPC is checked, enter the Operating Business Legal Name.

fields.name: dba
fields.tooltip: Enter the DBA or Tradename, if applicable.

fields.name: busTIN
fields.tooltip: Enter the Business TIN (may be an EIN or an SSN).

fields.name: PrimarIndustry
fields.tooltip: Please enter the 6-digit Primary Industry or NAICS code here.

fields.name: busphone
fields.tooltip: Enter the primary business phone number, including area code.

fields.name: UniqueEntityID
fields.tooltip: Please enter the Unique Entity ID used in SAM.gov, if applicable.

fields.name: yearbeginoperations
fields.tooltip: Enter the four-digit year the applicant business began operations.

fields.name: soleprop
fields.tooltip: If the entity type is Sole Proprietor, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: partnership
fields.tooltip: If the entity type is Partnership, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: ccorp
fields.tooltip: If the entity type is C-Corp, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: scorp
fields.tooltip: If the entity type is S-Corp, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: llc
fields.tooltip: If the entity type is LLC, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: etother
fields.tooltip: If the entity type is Other, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar, then enter a description in the following field.

fields.name: entityother
fields.tooltip: Please specify what other type of entity the applicant business is.

fields.name: ownESOP
fields.tooltip: If the Special Ownership Type is Employee Stock Ownership Plan (ESOP), please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: own401k
fields.tooltip: If the Special Ownership Type is 401(k) or ROBS 401(k) Trust, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: ownCooperative
fields.tooltip: If the Special Ownership Type is Cooperative, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: ownNATribe
fields.tooltip: If the Special Ownership Type is Native-American Tribal-Owned Business, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: ownOther
fields.tooltip: If the Special Ownership Type is Other, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar, then describe the other ownership type in the following field.

fields.name: specOwnTypeOther
fields.tooltip: Please specify the other special ownership type of the applicant business.

fields.name: busAddr
fields.tooltip: Please enter the Applicant business full address, including street, city, state, and zip code.

fields.name: projAddr
fields.tooltip: Please enter the Applicant business project address, if different from the business address, including street, city, state, and zip code.

fields.name: pocName
fields.tooltip: Please enter the primary contact's name here.

fields.name: pocEmail
fields.tooltip: Please enter the primary contact's email address here.

fields.name: existEmp
fields.tooltip: Please enter the number of existing employees here.

fields.name: fteJobs
fields.tooltip: Please enter the number of FTE jobs retained or saved in the next two years because of the loan, including owners.

fields.name: debtAmt
fields.tooltip: Please enter the dollar amount of the debt refinance here.

fields.name: purchConstr
fields.tooltip: If the purpose of the loan is the purchase of an existing building or the construction of commerical real estate, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar, then enter the dollar amount in the following field.

fields.name: purchAmt
fields.tooltip: Please enter the dollar amount of the building purchase or construction here.

fields.name: ownName1
fields.tooltip: Please enter the first owner's legal name, including first, middle, and last names.

fields.name: ownTitle1
fields.tooltip: Please enter the first owner's title here.

fields.name: ownPerc1
fields.tooltip: Please enter the first owner's percent ownership here.

fields.name: ownTin1
fields.tooltip: Please enter the first owner's TIN (SSN or EIN).

fields.name: ownHome1
fields.tooltip: Please enter the first owner's home address here.

fields.name: ownName2
fields.tooltip: Please enter the second owner's legal name, including first, middle, and last names.

fields.name: ownTitle2
fields.tooltip: Please enter the second owner's title here.

fields.name: ownPerc2
fields.tooltip: Please enter the second owner's percent ownership here.

fields.name: ownTin2
fields.tooltip: Please enter the second owner's TIN (SSN or EIN).

fields.name: ownHome2
fields.tooltip: Please enter the second owner's home address here.

fields.name: ownName3
fields.tooltip: Please enter the third owner's legal name, including first, middle, and last names.

fields.name: ownTitle3
fields.tooltip: Please enter the third owner's title here.

fields.name: ownPerc3
fields.tooltip: Please enter the third owner's percent ownership here.

fields.name: ownTin3
fields.tooltip: Please enter the third owner's TIN (SSN or EIN).

fields.name: ownHome3
fields.tooltip: Please enter the third owner's home address here.

fields.name: ownName4
fields.tooltip: Please enter the fourth owner's legal name, including first, middle, and last names.

fields.name: ownTitle4
fields.tooltip: Please enter the fourth owner's title here.

fields.name: ownPerc4
fields.tooltip: Please enter the fourth owner's percent ownership here.

fields.name: ownTin4
fields.tooltip: Please enter the fourth owner's TIN (SSN or EIN).

fields.name: ownHome4
fields.tooltip: Please enter the fourth owner's home address here.

fields.name: ownName5
fields.tooltip: Please enter the fifth owner's legal name, including first, middle, and last names.

fields.name: ownTitle5
fields.tooltip: Please enter the fifth owner's title here.

fields.name: ownPerc5
fields.tooltip: Please enter the fifth owner's percent ownership here.

fields.name: ownTin5
fields.tooltip: Please enter the fifth owner's TIN (SSN or EIN).

fields.name: ownHome5
fields.tooltip: Please enter the fifth owner's home address here.

fields.name: ownPos
fields.tooltip: Enter the owner's position.

fields.name: statNonVet
fields.tooltip: If the owner is not a veteran, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: statVet
fields.tooltip: If the owner is a veteran, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: statVetD
fields.tooltip: If the owner is a service-disabled veteran, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: statVetSp
fields.tooltip: If the owner is a veteran's spouse, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: statND
fields.tooltip: If the owner didn't disclose their veteran status, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: male
fields.tooltip: If the owner is male, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: female
fields.tooltip: If the owner is female, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: raceAIAN
fields.tooltip: If the owner's race is American Indian or Alaska Native, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: raceAsian
fields.tooltip: If the owner's race is Asian, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: raceBAA
fields.tooltip: If the owner's race is Black or African American, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: raceNHPI
fields.tooltip: If the owner's race is Native Hawaiian or Pacific Islander, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: raceWhite
fields.tooltip: If the owner's race is White, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: raceND
fields.tooltip: If the owner did not disclose their race, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: ethHisp
fields.tooltip: If the owner's ethnicity is Hispanic or Latino, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: ethNot
fields.tooltip: If the owner's ethnicity is not Hispanic or Latino, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: ethND
fields.tooltip: If the owner's ethnicity is not disclosed, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: q1Yes
fields.tooltip: If the applicant or any associate is presently suspended, debarred, proposed for debarment, declared ineligible, voluntarily excluded from participation in a transaction by any Federal department or agency, or presently involved in any bankruptcy, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: q1No
fields.tooltip: If the applicant or any associate is not presently suspended, debarred, proposed for debarment, declared ineligible, voluntarily excluded from participation in a transaction by any Federal department or agency, or presently involved in any bankruptcy, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: q2Yes
fields.tooltip: If the applicant or any associate is currently delinquent or has ever defaulted on a direct or guaranteed loan or been a guarantor on such a loan, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: q2No
fields.tooltip: If the applicant or any associate is not currently delinquent and has never defaulted on a direct or guaranteed loan or been a guarantor on such a loan, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: q3Yes
fields.tooltip: If the Applicant or any owner of the Applicant is an owner of any other business, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: q3No
fields.tooltip: If the Applicant and any owners of the Applicant are not owners of any other business, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: q4Yes
fields.tooltip: If the Applicant or any Associate of the Applicant is currently incarcerated or under indictment for a felony or any crime involving or relating to financial misconduct or a false statement, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: q4No
fields.tooltip: If the Applicant and any Associate of the Applicant are not currently incarcerated or under indictment for a felony or any crime involving or relating to financial misconduct or a false statement, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: q4Init
fields.tooltip: Please enter your electronic signature to confirm your response to question 4 by clicking or pressing the Enter key.

fields.name: q5Yes
fields.tooltip: If the Applicant has paid or committed to pay a fee to the Lender/CDC or a third party to assist in the preparation of the loan application or application materials, or if the Applicant has paid or committed to pay a referral agent or broker a fee, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: q5No
fields.tooltip: If the Applicant has not paid or committed to pay a fee to the Lender/CDC or a third party to assist in the preparation of the loan application or application materials, and if the Applicant has not paid or committed to pay a referral agent or broker a fee, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: q6Yes
fields.tooltip: If the applicant has paid or committed to pay a fee to the Lender or a third party to assist in the preparation of the loan application or application materials, or if the applicant has paid or committed to pay a referral agent or broker a fee, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: q6No
fields.tooltip: If the applicant has not paid or committed to pay a fee to the Lender or a third party to assist in the preparation of the loan application or application materials, and the applicant has not paid or committed to pay a referral agent or broker a fee, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: q7Yes
fields.tooltip: If any of the Applicant’s revenues are derived from gambling, loan packaging, lending activities, lobbying activities, or from the sale of products or services, or the presentation of any depiction, displays or live performances, of a prurient sexual nature, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: q7No
fields.tooltip: If none of the Applicant’s revenues are derived from gambling, loan packaging, lending activities, lobbying activities, or from the sale of products or services, or the presentation of any depiction, displays or live performances, of a prurient sexual nature, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: q8Yes
fields.tooltip: If any sole proprietor, partner, officer, director, stockholder with a 10% or more interest in the Applicant is an SBA employee or a Household Member of an SBA employee, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: q8No
fields.tooltip: If no sole proprietor, partner, officer, director, stockholder with a 10% or more interest in the Applicant is an SBA employee or a Household Member of an SBA employee, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: q9Yes
fields.tooltip: If any employee, owner, partner, attorney, agent, owner of stock, officer, director, creditor or debtor of the Applicant is a former SBA employee who has been separated from SBA for less than one year prior to the request for financial assistance, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: q9No
fields.tooltip: If no employee, owner, partner, attorney, agent, owner of stock, officer, director, creditor or debtor of the Applicant is a former SBA employee who has been separated from SBA for less than one year prior to the request for financial assistance, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: q10Yes
fields.tooltip: If any sole proprietor, general partner, officer, director, or stockholder with a 10% or more interest in the Applicant, or a household member of such individual, is a member of Congress, or an appointed official or employee of the legislative or judicial branch of the Federal Government, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: q10No
fields.tooltip: If no sole proprietor, general partner, officer, director, or stockholder with a 10% or more interest in the Applicant, or a household member of such individual, is a member of Congress, or an appointed official or employee of the legislative or judicial branch of the Federal Government, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: EquipAmt
fields.tooltip: Please enter the dollar amount of the acquisition or installation of equipment here.

fields.name: purpEquip
fields.tooltip: If the purpose of the loan is the Acquisition or Installation of Equipment, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar, then enter the dollar amount in the following field.

fields.name: workCap
fields.tooltip: If the purpose of the loan is Working Capital, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar, then enter the dollar amount in the following field.

fields.name: busAcq
fields.tooltip: If the purpose of the loan is the Business Acquisition (Change of Ownership), please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar, then enter the dollar amount in the following field.

fields.name: purpOther1
fields.tooltip: If the purpose of the loan is Other, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar, then enter the dollar amount in the following field.

fields.name: purpOther2
fields.tooltip: If the purpose of the loan includes a second Other Purpose, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar, then enter the dollar amount in the following field.

fields.name: purpInv
fields.tooltip: If the purpose of the loan is the Acquisition of Inventory, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar, then enter the dollar amount in the following field.

fields.name: debtRef
fields.tooltip: If the purpose of the loan is Debt Refinancing, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar, then enter the dollar amount in the following field.

fields.name: otherAmt2
fields.tooltip: Please enter the dollar amount of the second other purpose here.

fields.name: otherAmt1
fields.tooltip: Please enter the dollar amount of the other purpose here.

fields.name: invAmt
fields.tooltip: Please enter the dollar amount of the acquisition of inventory here.

fields.name: busAcqAmt
fields.tooltip: Please enter the dollar amount of the business acquisition here.

fields.name: capitalAmt
fields.tooltip: Please enter the dollar amount of the working capital here.

fields.name: q11Yes
fields.tooltip: If any sole proprietor, general partner, officer, director, or stockholder with a 10 percent or more interest in the Applicant, or a household member of such individual, is a Federal Government employee or Member of the Military having a grade of at least GS-13 or higher (or Military equivalent), please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: q11No
fields.tooltip: If no sole proprietor, general partner, officer, director, or stockholder with a 10 percent or more interest in the Applicant, or a household member of such individual, is a Federal Government employee or Member of the Military having a grade of at least GS-13 or higher (or Military equivalent), please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: q12Yes
fields.tooltip: If any sole proprietor, general partner, officer, director, or stockholder with a 10% or more interest in the Applicant, or a household member of such individual, is a member or employee of a Small Business Advisory Council or a SCORE volunteer, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: q12No
fields.tooltip: If no sole proprietor, general partner, officer, director, or stockholder with a 10% or more interest in the Applicant, or a household member of such individual, is a member or employee of a Small Business Advisory Council or a SCORE volunteer, please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: ownName
fields.tooltip: Please enter the owner's legal name, including first, middle, and last names.

fields.name: expSalesTot
fields.tooltip: Please enter the estimated total export sales this loan will support.

fields.name: expCtry1
fields.tooltip: Please enter the first principal country of export here.

fields.name: expCtry2
fields.tooltip: Please enter the second principal country of export here.

fields.name: expCtry3
fields.tooltip: Please enter the third principal country of export here.

fields.name: q13Yes
fields.tooltip: If the Applicant, any owner of the Applicant, or any business owned by them (Affiliates), is presently involved in any legal action (including divorce), please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: q13No
fields.tooltip: If the Applicant, any owner of the Applicant, or any business owned by them (Affiliates), is not presently involved in any legal action (including divorce), please check this box by clicking or pressing the Enter key or space bar.

fields.name: repSig
fields.tooltip: Please enter the digital signature of the authorized representative of the applicant by clicking or pressing the Enter key.

fields.name: sigDate
fields.tooltip: Please enter the date of the representative's signature in two-digit month / two-digit day / four-digit year format.

fields.name: repName
fields.tooltip: Please enter the authorized representative's name here.

fields.name: repTitle
fields.tooltip: Please enter the authorized representative's title here.

fields.name: fteCreate
fields.tooltip: Please enter the number of FTE jobs created in the next two years because of the loan, including owners.

fields.name: other1spec
fields.tooltip: Please specify the other purpose of the loan here.

fields.name: other2spec
fields.tooltip: Please specify the second other purpose of the loan here.
